about:
AquaFlow Plumbing started with a single van and a commitment to doing plumbing the right way. Founder and master plumber Mike Torres spent 15 years working for larger companies before deciding homeowners deserved better — honest pricing, clean work, and plumbers who actually show up on time.

Today our team of 12 licensed plumbers serves thousands of homes and businesses across the metro area. We've grown, but our values haven't changed: treat every home like it's our own, price every job fairly, and guarantee every repair.
aboutSubtitle: Family-owned and operated since 2008. We've built our reputation one happy customer at a time.

services.title: Emergency Plumbing
services.desc: Burst pipes, major leaks, sewage backups — we respond fast, 24/7. Average arrival time: 45 minutes.

services.title: Drain & Sewer
services.desc: Professional drain cleaning, camera inspection, and trenchless sewer repair with minimal disruption.

services.title: Water Heater
services.desc: Repair and replacement for tank and tankless systems. We service all major brands.

services.title: Leak Detection
services.desc: Non-invasive electronic leak detection technology to find hidden leaks without tearing up your home.

services.title: Pipe Repair & Replacement
services.desc: From minor repairs to full repiping. We work with copper, PEX, and PVC materials.

services.title: Toilet Repair
services.desc: Running toilets, clogs, replacements, and new installations handled quickly and cleanly.

services.title: Faucet Installation
services.desc: Kitchen, bathroom, and utility faucets. Professional installation with clean finishes.

services.title: Gas Line
services.desc: Gas line installation, repair, and leak detection by certified technicians. Safety first.

whyChooseUs.title: Upfront Pricing
whyChooseUs.desc: No surprises — you'll know the cost before we start any work.

whyChooseUs.title: Licensed Master Plumbers
whyChooseUs.desc: Fully certified professionals with years of hands-on experience.

whyChooseUs.title: Same-Day Service
whyChooseUs.desc: Available when you need us, often within hours of your call.

whyChooseUs.title: Lifetime Warranty
whyChooseUs.desc: We stand behind every job with our lifetime warranty on labor.

values.title: Integrity
values.desc: Upfront pricing with no hidden fees. Ever.

values.title: Family Values
values.desc: We treat your home the way we'd treat ours.

values.title: Craftsmanship
values.desc: Licensed masters who take pride in quality work.

values.title: Community
values.desc: Proud supporters of local schools and charities.

reviews.name: Maria Gonzalez
reviews.text: They fixed our burst pipe at midnight. Professional, fast, and the price was exactly what they quoted. Can't recommend enough.

reviews.name: Robert Chen
reviews.text: Called for a water heater replacement. They came same day, explained all our options, and had it running by evening. Excellent work.

reviews.name: Linda Patterson
reviews.text: After 3 other plumbers couldn't find our leak, AquaFlow diagnosed it in under an hour. Honest and highly skilled team.

reviews.name: James Okwu
reviews.text: Best plumbing experience we've had. On time, clean work area, fair pricing. They've earned a customer for life.

specials.title: $50 Off Water Heater Installation
specials.desc: Save on tank or tankless water heater installation. Mention this offer when scheduling.

specials.title: Free Drain Camera Inspection
specials.desc: Get a complimentary camera inspection with any drain cleaning service. See exactly what's going on.

specials.title: Winter Pipe Protection Package
specials.desc: Pipe insulation and freeze prevention check for just $149. Protect your home before the cold hits.

specials.title: Military & Senior Discount
specials.desc: 10% off all services for active military, veterans, and seniors 65+. Thank you for your service.

cta.headline: Don't let a small leak become a big problem.
cta.subtext: Our licensed plumbers are standing by. Call now or schedule at your convenience.

home.title: AquaFlow Plumbing | 24/7 Emergency Plumber in Metro City
home.description: Licensed plumber serving the metro area. Drain cleaning, water heater repair, leak detection & emergency plumbing. 24/7 service. Upfront pricing. Call (555) 123-4567.

about.title: About AquaFlow Plumbing | Metro City
about.description: Family-owned plumbing company serving the metro area since 2008. Licensed master plumbers, upfront pricing, and a satisfaction guarantee on every job.

services.title: Plumbing Services | AquaFlow Plumbing
services.description: Comprehensive plumbing solutions for homes and businesses. Drain cleaning, water heater repair, leak detection, pipe repair, and emergency plumbing. Every job backed by our satisfaction guarantee.

specials.title: Plumbing Specials & Coupons | AquaFlow Plumbing
specials.description: Save on quality plumbing services with current promotions from AquaFlow Plumbing. Water heater discounts, free inspections, and more.
